character.chronicle: MINDS EYE THEATER ~ PILLARS OF SALT

Print Sheet: MINDS EYE THEATER ~ PILLARS OF SALT
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows:
Yusuf was born to the Bedouin in the late 1600’s, he grew to be a man raiding his neighbors, he took a wife, then another.  Yusuf had children, was feared and successful as a tribal leader of his people.  Yusuf died of an invasion of his spirit by Evil Ones; they drove him to madness and for the safety of all he was cast into the wastes to be scoured clean of the evil.
In the wastes of the desert he stumbled, the mighty brought low and crushed with thirst, despair, and madness.  A greedy man had desired his wives, his hareem, his position, and his wealth.  Having contacts through his family with a magician, he had Yusuf cursed so that he could take all that he had and was. 
Yusuf survived four days and three nights on his own before the desert claimed him to its bosom.  He awoke in a cave, lit fitfully by a small torch with a man standing over him, “today is not your lucky day!”  The man descended on him forcing blood between his lips, he did this to the bound Yusuf for the next two nights, tying him to his service.  
And serve his master he did, for over a hundred years throughout the lands of Africa, Asia, the Middle East, and South Eastern Europe.  He and his master traveled to execute the bidding of their masters in the courts of the Ashirra, faceless dread forces beyond Yusuf’s ability to confront.  
Yusuf and his master were taken in their travels by a pack of Sabbat in 1823, his master killed in the fighting, and the Sabbat robbed of their prize, all they had left was Yusuf.  As his master had killed two of them in the ambush they embraced him to bolster their numbers.  
The pack, Host of Nod, was a pack of cast offs and rejects, anti-tribu and Clanless Sabbat banded together in a cause of strength and unity in numbers.  They trained and indoctrinated Yusuf in the ways of the Sabbat, taught him the ways of the Sword of Caine, and showed him the holy mission against the progenitor Antediluvians and the horrors they would bring to the race of Cainites.
Over time Yusuf grew in power, grew in strength, grew in renown, and gained the attention of the Black Hand.  All the years traveling with just his former Master had made Yusuf used to independence and Privacy.  His years as a ghoul training with his master, and the years with his pack marauding had made him more skilled and harder of mind and body than most.  He was an ideal candidate, recruited into the Black Hand in 1876 and sent to the training camps he emerged in 1884 with new skills and an inscrutable purpose masked by his training and visible dedication to the order.  
After several decades of service to the Hand he was sent to the Americas to serve as a Census Taker for the Hand, profiling and document the packs of the Americas, Founded and Nomadic.  He served the Hand through to the week of defections of the Assamites, the week of Nightmares and the Turmoils that resulted from the Red Star.  He was dragooned like many to the crusades on the East and Southern coasts of the United States and served for many years there.  Then came the lash back, he had left Savannah one night before the Hunters struck and they remained on his trail for over a month as he diverted all over North America before running to Mexico where he could find suitable daytime guardians.  
The blows the Sabbat had taken and the devastating losses of the Hand meant that no one who was not proven heretical could be spared, so despite the risks of the Hunters on his tail Yusuf was dispatched back to North America. He resumed his duties as a Census Taker, an even more vital task given the devastating losses the Sabbat packs had taken in the Time of Turmoil (1999 – 2005).  Yusuf has taken a newer lower profile in his tasks, only stating his membership in the Hand if required, not pushing his position on others in the wake of the blows to the Hands prestige.  


The Truth – 

Everything Yusuf presents to the outside world is filtered through one fact, as a mortal dying in the wastes hunted and haunted by evil spirits.  Yusuf was saved by a woman who took him to a garden in a cave and cared for and healed him.  Binding him with healing leaves from her plants, salves from her trees, and nourishment from her garden she cared for him for a week and a night.  Whispering the truths behind the veil, the hidden mysteries that the almighty had removed, the offenses of Caine, and the truths that Lilith, first wife of Adam, second human created by the Almighty.  
Drifting in a haze of reality and impressions Yusuf was indoctrinated to the mysteries of Lilith and sent forth to be intercepted in the wastes again by the agent of the Ashirra.  
Many times over the years Yusuf was contacted by these women, his secret knowledge held in a separate portion of his mind, locked away from his consciousness unless needed or called on by them.  
Following the Time of Turmoil, Yusuf has felt a draw to the west coast of the United States, he suspects his Sisters are directing his actions and movement, but it works with his cover as well any anything at this point.  He has been hearing about the False Prophet and how members of the Hand are defending him while the Inquisition has declared him heretic.  Discovering the truth of this situation and what possible interaction the Devil’s Night Riots have with the reported infernal activity in Los Angeles.  
Yusuf wants to know the truth, he wants to know why he was cursed by a Mage, targeted by the Lillins, Ghouled by the Ashirra court, Embraced by the Sabbat, and recruited by the Black Hand.  What guide is pushing his fate and future around the board and why.  He knows in his heart of hearts that only by continuing this twisted path will he come to more truths.  In the meantime he can do his job, maintain his contacts, strengthen himself, and learn all he can about those around him.  Someone, somewhere is the key to his fate.
